title: Vanilla Panorama with Shader
description: Enjoy vanilla panoramas with shader packs!
body: # Vanilla Panorama with Shader The name is quite evocative. Feel free to use it however you want! ### Credits : Thanks to Minecraft@Home team for the discovery of seeds. CaptTatsu for BSL Shaders. EminGT for Complementaries Shaders. The Vanilla Tweaks team.
